from Mercury; in l, 3, 4, 6, 10 and II places from Lagna; and
finally in 6, 11 and 12 places from Venus. Now enter the mark

astakavarga 265
in the several places noted above from the different significators
and show the results in a chart as shown in the adjoining figure : —
111 u. 111 111
111 111
Saturn's
Astakavarga
total 39
111 111
111 111
n 111 11 111
The total benefic dots in Saturn's Astakavarga is 39. In
this chart there are only two Rasis which possess six dots each.
They are Leo and Capricorn. And these happen to be the 6th
and 11th places from the natal Moon. Though the 3rd place
also is said to be good, still here as it contains only 3 benefic
dots it cannot. produce any good effect. The 6th viz. Leo,
though belonging to his enemy, yet must produce good effects
as it contains 6 dots. The 11th house, in addition to being his
own, contains also 6 dots. So it must produce excellent results.
